skill.name: Scorpion Sting
skill.description: Spines coated with deadly toxin erupt around you.

skill.name: Targo's Hammer
skill.description: Targo's celestial hammer orbits around you, striking down nearby foes.

skill.name: Twin Fangs
skill.description: Vampiric fangs assault your foes and sap them of vitality.

skill.name: Bull Rush
skill.description: Strike nearby foes in a rush of physical force, like a charging bull.

skill.name: Dryad's Blessing
skill.description: The dryad's blessing cleanses your wounds and wards you against poison.

skill.name: Guardian's Gaze
skill.description: A peerless eye of the Great Guardian circles around you.

skill.name: Falcon Swoop
skill.description: A cast of celestial falcons swoops down upon your foes.

skill.name: Flame Torrent
skill.description: Devilish flames swirl around you, incinerating all they touch.

skill.name: Ghoulish Hunger
skill.description: When cornered, you are thrown into a ghoulish fervor, desperate for a morsel of flesh.

skill.name: Aetherfire
skill.description: A small burst of aetherfire erupts at your target's feet.

skill.name: Shepherd's Call
skill.description: Call upon your minions to join you in battle.

skill.name: Turtle Shell
skill.description: When threatened, a protective barrier forms around you, negating further harm.

skill.name: Tsunami
skill.description: A torrent of water crashes down upon any foes unfortunate enough to be standing in front of you.

skill.name: Fetid Pool
skill.description: A festering pool erupts beneath your enemies, corrupting the ground.

skill.name: Blizzard
skill.description: Shards of razor-sharp ice rain down from the sky upon your foes.

skill.name: Blades of Wrath
skill.description: Push the advantage by unleashing a burst of phantasmal blades that pass through enemies with ease. ^oBlades initially deal 30% reduced damage before reaching their full strength as they expand outward.

skill.name: Trample
skill.description: Unleash a wave of force from your shield that shatters the very earth and scatters your foes.

skill.name: Giant's Blood
skill.description: Giant's blood flows through your veins, incurring improved regeneration and healing.

skill.name: Bysmiel's Command
skill.description: Call forth an eldritch hound to snap and tear at your foes. The hound's presence in the physical realm is unstable and it will only remain at your side for a limited time. ^oThe hound scales with Pet Bonuses.

skill.name: Wayward Soul
skill.description: Sacrifice a wayward soul to ward yourself against the specter of death.

skill.name: Arcane Barrier
skill.description: A barrier to the forces of magic forms around you.

skill.name: Fissure
skill.description: A fissure opens in the earth, spewing lava and brimstone upon nearby foes.

skill.name: Acid Spray
skill.description: The manticore's sting pierces through your target, creating a spray of caustic acid behind them.

skill.name: Messenger of War
skill.description: Carry on your message of conquest, rebuking any foe daring enough to try and stop you.

skill.name: Raise the Dead
skill.description: Raise the dead to serve you. The necrotic energies required for this ritual are very unstable however, and the undead minions will only exist for a limited time. ^oThe dead scale with player damage bonuses.

skill.name: Elemental Storm
skill.description: A crackling whirlwind of flame and ice manifests itself at your command.

skill.name: Tip the Scales
skill.description: Tip the scales in your favor, sapping your attackers of vitality and transferring it to you.

skill.name: Shield Wall
skill.description: A metaphysical barrier forms around you.

skill.name: Reckless Tempest
skill.description: Static energy swells within you, unleashed upon nearby foes in the form of destructive bolts of lightning.

constellations.name: Ulo the Keeper of the Waters

skill.name: Cleansing Waters
skill.description: Ulo's cleansing waters purge all foul magic from the area, removing beneficial auras and spells from foes while allies are cleansed of negative ailments, including damage over time effects.

skill.name: Arcane Bomb
skill.description: Mark the ground with an arcane sigil that erupts upon coming in contact with an enemy. ^oArcane Bombs take 1 second to arm.

skill.name: Abominable Might
skill.description: The chaotic powers of the Void flow through you, turning your weapons into conduits for your fiendish might.

skill.name: Tainted Eruption
skill.description: The corruption trapped within you is unleashed in a massive explosion of vile toxins.

skill.name: Time Dilation
skill.description: The sands of the hourglass spin in an untamed whirlwind. The laws of time itself no longer apply to you.

skill.name: Elemental Seeker
skill.description: Conjure an eldritch creature of pure energy that seeks out and burns nearby foes with its very presence before returning to the Aether in an explosion of energy. ^oElemental Seekers scale with player damage bonuses.

skill.name: Whirlpool
skill.description: The stirring depths are unleashed as a hungering whirlpool appears to devastate your foes.

skill.name: Light of Empyrion
skill.description: The divine light of Empyrion banishes the darkness and sears your foes.

skill.name: Howl of Mogdrogen
skill.description: Driven by the thrill of a fresh kill, you and your minions enter a fervent rage.

skill.name: Blind Fury
skill.description: Exhilarated by the blood and gore you spill, you violently assault all nearby foes in a flurry of vicious blows.

skill.name: Spear of the Heavens
skill.description: A celestial spear smites foes who dare strike you.

skill.name: Meteor Shower
skill.description: At your behest, the sky splits open to unleash several barrages of molten rock. ^oOnly one Meteor Shower can be cast at any one time.

skill.name: Living Shadow
skill.description: A manifestation of a nameless hero rises to fight alongside you and restore your vitality with every blow. ^oLiving Shadows scale with player damage bonuses.
